---
title: "CV"
comments: false
---

## Work Experience

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Machine Learning Engineer</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2026 – Present</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Youwe Concept B.V. · The Netherlands</div>
<ul>
<li>...</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Lecturer in Artificial Intelligence</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2023 – 2026</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">University of Groningen · The Netherlands</div>
<ul>
<li>Taught and designed undergraduate and graduate-level courses in Signals &amp; Systems, Reinforcement Learning, and Machine Learning.</li>
<li>Supervised Bachelor's and Master's thesis projects, guiding students in the application of AI principles and research methodologies.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Teaching Assistant</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2021 – 2022</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Wisenet Center – University of Agder · Norway</div>
<ul>
<li>Supported the design of the Ph.D. course in Deep Reinforcement Learning.</li>
<li>Taught lectures in advanced reinforcement learning algorithms to doctoral students.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Teaching Assistant</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2018 – 2019</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Queen's University · Canada</div>
<ul>
<li>Tutored in Linear Algebra, Statistics, and Differential Equations courses.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Project Assistant</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2016 – 2017</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">General Hospital of Medellin · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Designed a MakerSpace for healthcare-related projects inside the Hospital.</li>
<li>Developed learning activities about co-creation methodologies for healthcare professionals.</li>
<li>Prototyped two devices related to hand-washing monitoring and sterilization using the proposed co-creation methodology.</li>
<li>Supervised biomedical engineering students in projects about innovation in medical devices.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Student Intern</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">Winter 2015</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">RWTH Aachen University · Germany</div>
<ul>
<li>Designed algorithms to compute the size of aerosol particles from laser beam intensities.</li>
<li>Tested a Bayesian inversion method to estimate aerosol particle size in a controlled environment.</li>
</ul>
</div>

## Education

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Ph.D. in Engineering and Science</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2026 (expected)</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">University of Agder · Norway</div>
<ul>
<li><em>Project:</em> Safe Deep Reinforcement Learning Techniques for Data-Driven Adaptive Control</li>
<li><em>Selected courses:</em> Convex and Non-convex Optimization, Deep Learning, Statistical Signal Processing</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">M.Sc. in Mathematics and Statistics</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2019</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Queen's University · Canada</div>
<ul>
<li><em>Project:</em> On the Kalman filter with intermittent observations</li>
<li><em>Selected courses:</em> Stochastic Control, Modern Control Theory, Data Compression and Source Coding</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">B.S. in Mechatronics Engineering</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2016</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">EIA University · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li><em>Project:</em> Autonomous mobile robot navigation using particle filtering in the localization stage</li>
<li><em>Selected courses:</em> Robotics, Artificial Intelligence, Continuous and Discrete Control, Mechatronics Design</li>
</ul>
</div>

## Skills

<div class="cv-skill-group">
<div class="cv-skill-group-label">Industry Knowledge</div>
<div class="cv-badges">
<span class="cv-badge">Research</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Engineering Design</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Agile</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Design Thinking</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Co-Creation</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-skill-group">
<div class="cv-skill-group-label">Programming Languages</div>
<div class="cv-badges">
<span class="cv-badge">Python</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Matlab</span>
<span class="cv-badge">SQL</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-skill-group">
<div class="cv-skill-group-label">Libraries &amp; Frameworks</div>
<div class="cv-badges">
<span class="cv-badge">PyTorch</span>
<span class="cv-badge">TensorFlow</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Keras</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Horovod</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Pandas</span>
<span class="cv-badge">NumPy</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Matplotlib</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-skill-group">
<div class="cv-skill-group-label">Tools</div>
<div class="cv-badges">
<span class="cv-badge">Git / GitHub</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Docker</span>
<span class="cv-badge">LaTeX</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Web Design</span>
</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-skill-group">
<div class="cv-skill-group-label">Prototyping</div>
<div class="cv-badges">
<span class="cv-badge">3D Printing</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Inventor Fusion</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Siemens Solid Edge</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Altium</span>
<span class="cv-badge">Arduino</span>
<span class="cv-badge">PIC Microcontroller</span>
</div>
</div>

## Grants

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Colfuturo Scholarship-Loan</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2017</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Colfuturo · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Grant issued by the Foundation for the Future of Colombia and the Colombian Ministry of Science, Technology, and Innovation. Used for graduate studies at Queen's University.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Fondo Sapiencia – EPM</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2011</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Sapiencia – Medellin Mayor's Office · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Grant issued by the higher education agency of the Medellin Mayor's office. Used for bachelor studies at EIA University.</li>
</ul>
</div>

## Awards

<div class="cv-entry cv-entry--award">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Teacher of The Year Award for AI &amp; CCS</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2025</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Programme Committee AI &amp; CCS – University of Groningen · The Netherlands</div>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry cv-entry--award">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Finalist at the Forsker Grand Prix</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2020</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">University of Agder · Norway</div>
<ul>
<li>Finalist in the science popularisation contest Forsker Grand Prix with the talk "Helping machines to make safe actions."</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry cv-entry--award">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Orchid Gold Award</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2014</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Medellin Council · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Awarded to my robotics team for developments in mobile robots for international university competitions.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry cv-entry--award">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Champion at RoboRave International</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2014</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">RoboRave · USA</div>
<ul>
<li>Won first place in the Fire Fighting challenge with an autonomous mobile robot (Arduino + PIC Microcontroller).</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry cv-entry--award">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Champion at RoboRave Colombia</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2013</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">RoboRave · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Won first place in the Fire Fighting challenge with an autonomous mobile robot (Arduino + PIC).</li>
</ul>
</div>

## Service and Leadership

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Reviewer</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2022 – Present</span>
</div>
<ul>
<li>Review scientific papers for multiple conferences and journals in AI and control.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Academic and Skills Development Coordinator</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2021 – 2022</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">UiAdoc · Norway</div>
<ul>
<li>Organized events to support professional development of doctoral researchers in Agder.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Event Organizer</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2021</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">ACI Medellin · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Organized virtual conferences in science popularization and cultural exchange for small businesses.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Community Manager</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2019</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">IEEE Colombia · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Managed social media accounts to promote the 4th IEEE Colombian Conference on Automatic Control.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Student Mentor</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2017</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Clubes de Ciencia Colombia · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Developed a workshop on 3D printing and CAD modelling to prototype medical devices, targeting young people aged 13–18.</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="cv-entry">
<div class="cv-entry-header">
<span class="cv-entry-title">Student Mentor</span>
<span class="cv-entry-date">2016</span>
</div>
<div class="cv-entry-org">Parque Explora · Colombia</div>
<ul>
<li>Supported a school research project developing a robotic manipulator prototype for use in chemical laboratories.</li>
</ul>
</div>
